reviews.review_description: Alright listen, despite this game being a Gorilla tag copy, it gives me nostalgia alright, but these 5-10 year old Players with apk’s in the game? Pisses me off. Like I’m just trying to enjoy the game alright, This Kid name “Hello” approaches me and says “I just have sticks” as he is hella taller than me In-game because of the Apk or whatever the hell they use. Since it was just me and them I decide to leave the lobby but then he tries to stop me as he uses platforms to go to stump by saying this “Please don’t leave I’ll crash your game if you do!”. Of course I do the  right thing and report him for Cheating , Then he lags out my game. I had other encounters with other players with apks, but I’m only explaining this one. This game would be decent if it hadn’t  had any Modders.

Nice game bro I really enjoyed it and please dont be toxic to others the game is the best game ever made 






Great game and can i have mod please i like the game i play it every day and i try to make the community more active and nontoxic 
Its up to u
This game is really bad because it’s just a gorilla tag copy and it has no mods if it had mods it would probably be better if it had mods, but since it doesn’t, I don’t really like the game.

developer_response.body: doesnt matter if it has mods or not. no need to rate this game 1 star over fricking mods. your a 6 year old who is addicted to mods on gorilla tag copys. just shut up
